 84→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.CodeStyleValue.ktlint_official
 85→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.EditorConfig
 86→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY
 87→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY
 88→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.firstChildLeafOrSelf
 89→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isPartOfComment
 90→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isRoot
 91→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpace
 92→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline
 93→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline
 94→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.lastChildLeafOrSelf
 95→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextCodeLeaf
 96→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextCodeSibling
 97→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextLeaf
 98→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextSibling
 99→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.parent
100→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.prevCodeLeaf

100→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.prevCodeLeaf
 101→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.prevLeaf
 102→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.prevSibling
 103→import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
 104→import mu.KotlinLogging
 105→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 106→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiComment
 107→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 108→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtStringTemplateExpression
 109→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 110→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.parents
 111→import java.util.Deque
 112→import java.util.LinkedList
 113→
 114→private val LOGGER = KotlinLogging.logger {}.initKtLintKLogger()
 115→
 116→public class IndentationRule :
 117→    StandardRule(
 118→        id = "indent",
 119→        visitorModifiers = setOf(
 120→            VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 121→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 122→                ruleId = FUNCTION_SIGNATURE_RULE_ID,
 123→                mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 124→            ),
 125→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 126→                ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_CALL_SITE_RULE_ID,
 127→                mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 128→            ),
 129→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 130→                ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_RULE_ID,
 131→                mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 132→            ),
 133→        ),
 134→        usesEditorConfigProperties = setOf(
 135→            CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 136→            INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 137→            INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 138→        ),
 139→    ) {
 140→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 141→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 142→
 143→    private var line = 1
 144→
 145→    private val indentContextStack: Deque<IndentContext> = LinkedList()
 146→
 147→    private lateinit var stringTemplateIndenter: StringTemplateIndenter
 148→
 149→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 150→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 151→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 152→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 153→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 154→        )
 155→        if (indentConfig.disabled) {
 156→            stopTraversalOfAST()
 157→        }
 158→    }
 159→
 160→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 161→        node: ASTNode,
 162→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 163→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 164→    ) {
 165→        if (node.isRoot()) {
 166→            // File should not start with a whitespace
 167→            node
 168→                .nextLeaf()
 169→                ?.takeIf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 170→                ?.let { whitespaceWithoutNewline ->
 171→                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected indentation", true)
 172→                    if (autoCorrect) {
 173→                        whitespaceWithoutNewline.treeParent.removeChild(whitespaceWithoutNewline)
 174→                    }
 175→                }
 176→            indentContextStack.addLast(startNoIndentZone(node))
 177→        }
 178→
 179→        when {
 180→            node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() -> {
 181→                line++
 182→                if (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.activated == false) {
 183→                    val lastIndentContext = indentContextStack.removeLast()
 184→                    indentContextStack.addLast(
 185→                        lastIndentContext.copy(activated = true),
 186→                    )
 187→                }
 188→                visitNewLineIndentation(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 189→            }
 190→
 191→            node.elementType == CLASS_BODY ||
 192→                node.elementType == CONTEXT_RECEIVER_LIST ||
 193→                node.elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY ||
 194→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY ||
 195→                node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE ||
 196→                node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST ->
 197→                startIndentContext(
 198→                    fromAstNode = node,
 199→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 200→                )
 201→
 202→            node.elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR ->
 203→                visitSecondaryConstructor(node)
 204→
 205→            node.elementType == PARENTHESIZED &&
 206→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != IF ->
 207→                startIndentContext(node)
 208→
 209→            node.elementType == BINARY_WITH_TYPE ||
 210→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 211→                node.elementType == TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST ||
 212→                node.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST ->
 213→                startIndentContext(node)
 214→
 215→            node.elementType == DELEGATED_SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 216→                node.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION ||
 217→                node.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE ->
 218→                startIndentContext(
 219→                    fromAstNode = node,
 220→                    childIndent = "",
 221→                )
 222→
 223→            node.elementType == IF ->
 224→                visitIf(node)
 225→
 226→            node.elementType == LBRACE ->
 227→                visitLbrace(node)
 228→
 229→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST &&
 230→                node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL ->
 231→                startIndentContext(
 232→                    fromAstNode = node,
 233→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 234→                )
 235→
 236→            node.elementType == LPAR &&
 237→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CONDITION ->
 238→                visitLparBeforeCondition(node)
 239→
 240→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER ->
 241→                visitValueParameter(node)
 242→
 243→            node.elementType == FUN ->
 244→                visitFun(node)
 245→
 246→            node.elementType == CLASS ->
 247→                visitClass(node)
 248→
 249→            node.elementType == OBJECT_DECLARATION ->
 250→                visitObjectDeclaration(node)
 251→
 252→            node.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION ->
 253→                visitBinaryExpression(node)
 254→
 255→            node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION ||
 256→                node.elementType == SAFE_ACCESS_EXPRESSION ||
 257→                node.elementType == USER_TYPE -> {
 258→                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
 259→                    node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 260→                    node.treeParent?.elementType == ARRAY_ACCESS_EXPRESSION &&
 261→                    node.treeParent?.treeParent?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION
 262→                ) {
 263→                    // Issue 1540: Deviate and fix from incorrect formatting in IntelliJ IDEA formatting and produce following:
 264→                    // val fooBar2 = foo
 265→                    //    .bar[0] {
 266→                    //        "foobar"
 267→                    //    }
 268→                    startIndentContext(
 269→                        fromAstNode = node.treeParent,
 270→                        toAstNode = node.treeParent.treeParent.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 271→                    )
 272→                } else if (node.treeParent?.elementType != node.elementType) {
 273→                    startIndentContext(node)
 274→                }
 275→            }
 276→
 277→            node.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
 278→                node.treeParent.elementType == PROPERTY ->
 279→                visitIdentifierInProperty(node)
 280→
 281→            node.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY &&
 282→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE ->
 283→                visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 284→
 285→            node.elementType == WHEN ->
 286→                visitWhen(node)
 287→
 288→            node.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY ->
 289→                visitWhenEntry(node)
 290→
 291→            node.elementType == WHERE_KEYWORD &&
 292→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST ->
 293→                visitWhereKeywordBeforeTypeConstraintList(node)
 294→
 295→            node.elementType == KDOC ->
 296→                visitKdoc(node)
 297→
 298→            node.elementType == PROPERTY_ACCESSOR ->
 299→                visitPropertyAccessor(node)
 300→
 301→            node.elementType == FOR ||
 302→                node.elementType == WHILE ->
 303→                visitConditionalLoop(node)
 304→
 305→            node.elementType == LBRACKET ->
 306→                visitLBracket(node)
 307→
 308→            node.elementType == NULLABLE_TYPE ->
 309→                visitNullableType(node)
 310→
 311→            node.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION -> visitDestructuringDeclaration(node)
 312→
 313→            else -> {
 314→                LOGGER.trace { "No processing for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
 315→            }
 316→        }
 317→    }
 318→
 319→    private fun visitSecondaryConstructor(node: ASTNode) {
 320→        node
 321→            .findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_DELEGATION_CALL)
 322→            ?.let { constructorDelegationCall ->
 323→                val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 324→                val nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 325→                    fromAstNode = constructorDelegationCall,
 326→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 327→
 328→                // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 329→                if (fromAstNode != node.nextLeaf()) {
 330→                    startIndentContext(
 331→                        fromAstNode = node,
 332→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 333→                        childIndent = "",
 334→                    )
 335→                }
 336→            }
 337→    }
 338→
 339→    private fun visitIf(node: ASTNode) {
 340→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 341→        node
 342→            .findChildByType(ELSE)
 343→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 344→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 345→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 346→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 347→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 348→            }
 349→
 350→        node
 351→            .findChildByType(THEN)
 352→            ?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 353→            ?.nextLeaf()
 354→            ?.let { nodeAfterThenBlock ->
 355→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 356→                    fromAstNode = nodeAfterThenBlock,
 357→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 358→                    childIndent = "",
 359→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 360→            }
 361→        node
 362→            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 363→            ?.nextCodeLeaf()
 364→            ?.let { nodeAfterConditionBlock ->
 365→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 366→                    fromAstNode = nodeAfterConditionBlock,
 367→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 368→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 369→            }
 370→        startIndentContext(
 371→            fromAstNode = node,
 372→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 373→            lastChildIndent = "", // No indent for the RPAR
 374→        )
 375→    }
 376→
 377→    private fun visitLbrace(node: ASTNode) {
 378→        // Outer indent context
 379→        val rbrace = requireNotNull(
 380→            node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE },
 381→        ) { "Can not find matching rbrace" }
 382→        startIndentContext(
 383→            fromAstNode = node,
 384→            toAstNode = rbrace,
 385→            firstChildIndent = "",
 386→            lastChildIndent = "",
 387→        )
 388→
 389→        // Inner indent context in reversed order
 390→        node
 391→            .treeParent
 392→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL }
 393→            ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
 394→            ?.let { arrow ->
 395→                startIndentContext(
 396→                    fromAstNode = arrow,
 397→                    toAstNode = rbrace,
 398→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 399→                )
 400→                startIndentContext(
 401→                    fromAstNode = node,
 402→                    toAstNode = arrow.prevCodeLeaf()!!,
 403→                    childIndent = arrow.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters(),
 404→                )
 405→            }
 406→    }
 407→
 408→    private fun ASTNode.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters() =
 409→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official || isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine()) {
 410→            // val fieldExample =
 411→            //      LongNameClass {
 412→            //              paramA,
 413→            //              paramB,
 414→            //              paramC ->
 415→            //          ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 416→            //      }
 417→            indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 418→        } else {
 419→            // Allow default IntelliJ IDEA formatting:
 420→            // val fieldExample =
 421→            //     LongNameClass { paramA,
 422→            //                     paramB,
 423→            //                     paramC ->
 424→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 425→            //     }
 426→            parent(CALL_EXPRESSION)
 427→                ?.let { callExpression ->
 428→                    val textBeforeFirstParameter =
 429→                        callExpression.findChildByType(REFERENCE_EXPRESSION)?.text +
 430→                            " { "
 431→                    " ".repeat(textBeforeFirstParameter.length)
 432→                }
 433→                ?: indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 434→        }
 435→
 436→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine() =
 437→        parent(FUNCTION_LITERAL)
 438→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
 439→            ?.prevSibling { it.textContains('\n') } != null
 440→
 441→    private fun visitLparBeforeCondition(node: ASTNode) {
 442→        startIndentContext(
 443→            fromAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextLeaf()), // Allow to pickup whitespace before condition
 444→            toAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextCodeSibling()).lastChildLeafOrSelf(), // Ignore whitespace after condition but before rpar
 445→            nodeIndent = currentIndent() + indentConfig.indent,
 446→            childIndent = "",
 447→        )
 448→    }
 449→
 450→    private fun visitValueParameter(node: ASTNode) {
 451→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 452→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 453→        node
 454→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 455→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 456→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 457→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 458→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 459→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 460→            }
 461→
 462→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 463→        val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 464→        if (fromAstNode != node.firstChildNode &&
 465→            node.prevSibling { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() } == null &&
 466→            node == node.treeParent.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER)
 467→        ) {
 468→            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 469→                fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 470→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 471→            ).fromASTNode.prevLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpace() }!!
 472→        } else {
 473→            startIndentContext(
 474→                fromAstNode = node,
 475→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 476→                childIndent = "",
 477→            )
 478→        }
 479→    }
 480→
 481→    private fun visitFun(node: ASTNode) {
 482→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 483→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 484→        val eqOrBlock =
 485→            node.findChildByType(EQ)
 486→                ?: node.findChildByType(BLOCK)
 487→        eqOrBlock?.let {
 488→            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 489→                fromAstNode = eqOrBlock,
 490→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 491→            ).prevCodeLeaf()
 492→        }
 493→
 494→        node
 495→            .findChildByType(TYPE_REFERENCE)
 496→            ?.let { typeReference ->
 497→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 498→                    fromAstNode = typeReference.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 499→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 500→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 501→            }
 502→
 503→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as function itself
 504→        startIndentContext(
 505→            fromAstNode = node,
 506→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 507→            childIndent = "",
 508→        )
 509→    }
 510→
 511→    private fun visitClass(node: ASTNode) {
 512→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 513→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 514→        node
 515→            .findChildByType(WHERE_KEYWORD)
 516→            ?.let { where ->
 517→                val typeConstraintList =
 518→                    requireNotNull(
 519→                        where.nextCodeSibling(),
 520→                    ) { "Can not find code sibling after WHERE in CLASS" }
 521→                require(
 522→                    typeConstraintList.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST,
 523→                ) { "Code sibling after WHERE in CLASS is not a TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST" }
 524→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 525→                    fromAstNode = where.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 526→                    toAstNode = typeConstraintList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 527→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 528→            }
 529→        node
 530→            .findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 531→            ?.let { superTypeList ->
 532→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 533→                    fromAstNode = superTypeList.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 534→                    toAstNode = superTypeList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 535→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 536→            }
 537→
 538→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as class itself
 539→        startIndentContext(
 540→            fromAstNode = node,
 541→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 542→            childIndent = "",
 543→        )
 544→    }
 545→
 546→    private fun visitObjectDeclaration(node: ASTNode) {
 547→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 548→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 549→        node
 550→            .findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 551→            ?.let { superTypeList ->
 552→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 553→                    fromAstNode = superTypeList.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 554→                    toAstNode = superTypeList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 555→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 556→            }
 557→
 558→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as class itself
 559→        startIndentContext(
 560→            fromAstNode = node,
 561→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 562→            childIndent = "",
 563→        )
 564→    }
 565→
 566→    private fun visitBinaryExpression(node: ASTNode) {
 567→        if (isPartOfBinaryExpressionWrappedInCondition(node)) {
 568→            // Complex binary expression are nested in such a way that the indent context of the condition
 569→            // wrapper is not the last node on the stack
 570→            val conditionIndentContext =
 571→                indentContextStack.last { it.fromASTNode.elementType != BINARY_EXPRESSION }
 572→            // Create new indent context for the remainder (operator and right-hand side) of the binary expression
 573→            startIndentContext(
 574→                fromAstNode = node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)!!,
 575→                toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 576→                nodeIndent = conditionIndentContext.nodeIndent,
 577→                childIndent = conditionIndentContext.childIndent,
 578→            )
 579→            startIndentContext(node.firstChildNode)
 580→        } else if (node.treeParent?.elementType != BINARY_EXPRESSION ||
 581→            node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)?.firstChildNode?.elementType == ELVIS
 582→        ) {
 583→            startIndentContext(node)
 584→        }
 585→    }
 586→
 587→    private fun visitIdentifierInProperty(node: ASTNode) {
 588→        startIndentContext(
 589→            fromAstNode = node,
 590→            toAstNode = node.treeParent.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 591→        )
 592→    }
 593→
 594→    private fun visitWhen(node: ASTNode) {
 595→        var nextToASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 596→        node
 597→            .findChildByType(LPAR)
 598→            ?.let { lpar ->
 599→                nextToASTNode = startIndentContext(
 600→                    fromAstNode = lpar,
 601→                    toAstNode = node.findChildByType(RPAR)!!,
 602→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 603→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 604→            }
 605→        startIndentContext(
 606→            fromAstNode = node,
 607→            toAstNode = nextToASTNode,
 608→        )
 609→    }
 610→
 611→    private fun visitWhenEntry(node: ASTNode) {
 612→        node
 613→            .findChildByType(ARROW)
 614→            ?.let { arrow ->
 615→                val outerIndent =
 616→                    if (arrow.nextLeaf()?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 617→                        ""
 618→                    } else {
 619→                        indentConfig.indent
 620→                    }
 621→                startIndentContext(
 622→                    fromAstNode = arrow.nextLeaf()!!,
 623→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 624→                    firstChildIndent = outerIndent,
 625→                    lastChildIndent = outerIndent,
 626→                )
 627→                startIndentContext(
 628→                    fromAstNode = node,
 629→                    toAstNode = arrow,
 630→                    childIndent = "",
 631→                )
 632→            }
 633→    }
 634→
 635→    private fun visitWhereKeywordBeforeTypeConstraintList(node: ASTNode) {
 636→        startIndentContext(
 637→            fromAstNode = node,
 638→            toAstNode = node.nextCodeSibling()?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()!!,
 639→            childIndent = TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT,
 640→        )
 641→    }
 642→
 643→    private fun visitKdoc(node: ASTNode) {
 644→        node
 645→            .findChildByType(KDOC_START)
 646→            ?.nextLeaf()
 647→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 648→                startIndentContext(
 649→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 650→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 651→                    childIndent = KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT,
 652→                )
 653→            }
 654→    }
 655→
 656→    private fun visitPropertyAccessor(node: ASTNode) {
 657→        var nextToASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 658→        node
 659→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 660→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 661→                nextToASTNode = startIndentContext(
 662→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 663→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 664→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 665→            }
 666→        // No indent on preceding annotations and comments
 667→        startIndentContext(
 668→            fromAstNode = node,
 669→            toAstNode = nextToASTNode,
 670→            childIndent = "",
 671→        )
 672→    }
 673→
 674→    private fun visitConditionalLoop(node: ASTNode) {
 675→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 676→        node
 677→            .findChildByType(BODY)
 678→            ?.takeIf { it.nextCodeLeaf()?.elementType != LBRACE }
 679→            ?.let { rpar ->
 680→                startIndentContext(
 681→                    fromAstNode = rpar,
 682→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 683→                )
 684→            }
 685→        node
 686→            .findChildByType(CONDITION)
 687→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 688→                startIndentContext(fromAstNode)
 689→            }
 690→    }
 691→
 692→    private fun visitLBracket(node: ASTNode) {
 693→        node
 694→            .treeParent
 695→            .takeUnless {
 696→                // Should be resolved in IntelliJ IDEA default formatter:
 697→                // https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KTIJ-14859/Too-little-indentation-inside-the-brackets-in-multiple-annotations-with-the-same-target
 698→                it.elementType == ANNOTATION
 699→            }?.findChildByType(RBRACKET)
 700→            ?.let { rbracket ->
 701→                startIndentContext(
 702→                    fromAstNode = node,
 703→                    toAstNode = rbracket,
 704→                    firstChildIndent = "",
 705→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 706→                )
 707→            }
 708→    }
 709→
 710→    private fun visitNullableType(node: ASTNode) {
 711→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 712→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 713→        node
 714→            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 715→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 716→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 717→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 718→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 719→                    childIndent = "",
 720→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 721→            }
 722→        startIndentContext(
 723→            fromAstNode = node,
 724→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 725→        )
 726→    }
 727→
 728→    private fun visitDestructuringDeclaration(node: ASTNode) {
 729→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 730→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 731→        node
 732→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 733→            ?.let { eq ->
 734→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 735→                    fromAstNode = eq,
 736→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 737→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 738→            }
 739→
 740→        node
 741→            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 742→            ?.let {
 743→                startIndentContext(
 744→                    fromAstNode = node,
 745→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 746→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 747→                )
 748→            }
 749→    }

 751→    private fun ASTNode.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations(): ASTNode {
 752→        require(elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR || elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER)
 753→        return findChildByType(MODIFIER_LIST)
 754→            ?.let { modifierList ->
 755→                modifierList
 756→                    .children()
 757→                    .firstOrNull { !it.isWhiteSpace() && !it.isPartOfComment() && it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
 758→                    ?: modifierList.nextCodeSibling()
 759→            }
 760→            ?: children().firstOrNull { !it.isWhiteSpace() && !it.isPartOfComment() }
 761→            ?: this
 762→    }
 763→
 764→    private fun ASTNode.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(): ASTNode {
 765→        var fromAstNode: ASTNode? = this
 766→        while (fromAstNode?.prevLeaf() != null &&
 767→            (fromAstNode.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpace() || fromAstNode.prevLeaf()?.isPartOfComment() == true)
 768→        ) {
 769→            fromAstNode = fromAstNode.prevLeaf()
 770→        }
 771→        return fromAstNode!!
 772→    }
 773→
 774→    private fun isPartOfBinaryExpressionWrappedInCondition(node: ASTNode) =
 775→        node
 776→            .parents()
 777→            .takeWhile { it.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION || it.elementType == CONDITION }
 778→            .lastOrNull()
 779→            ?.elementType == CONDITION
 780→
 781→    private fun currentIndent() =
 782→        indentContextStack
 783→            .peekLast()
 784→            .indent()
 785→
 786→    private fun startIndentContext(
 787→        fromAstNode: ASTNode,
 788→        toAstNode: ASTNode = fromAstNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 789→        nodeIndent: String = currentIndent(),
 790→        childIndent: String = indentConfig.indent,
 791→        firstChildIndent: String = childIndent,
 792→        lastChildIndent: String = childIndent,
 793→    ): IndentContext =
 794→        IndentContext(
 795→            fromASTNode = fromAstNode,
 796→            toASTNode = toAstNode,
 797→            nodeIndent = nodeIndent,
 798→            firstChildIndent = firstChildIndent,
 799→            childIndent = childIndent,
 800→            lastChildIndent = lastChildIndent,
 801→        ).also { newIndentContext ->
 802→            LOGGER.trace {
 803→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.nodeIndent)
 804→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.childIndent)
 805→                "Create new indent context (same as parent) with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
 806→                    "${fromAstNode.elementType}: ${newIndentContext.nodes}"
 807→            }
 808→            indentContextStack.addLast(newIndentContext)
 809→        }
 810→
 811→    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
 812→        node: ASTNode,
 813→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 814→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 815→    ) {
 816→        while (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.toASTNode == node) {
 817→            LOGGER.trace {
 818→                val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
 819→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
 820→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
 821→                "Remove indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for ${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: " +
 822→                    "${indentContext.nodes}"
 823→            }
 824→            indentContextStack
 825→                .removeLast()
 826→                .also {
 827→                    LOGGER.trace {
 828→                        val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
 829→                        val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
 830→                        val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
 831→                        "Last indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
 832→                            "${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: ${indentContext.nodes}"
 833→                    }
 834→                }
 835→        }
 836→    }
 837→
 838→    override fun afterLastNode() {
 839→        require(indentContextStack.isEmpty()) {
 840→            indentContextStack
 841→                .joinToString(prefix = "Stack should be empty:\n\t", separator = "\n\t") { it.toString() }
 842→        }
 843→    }
 844→
 845→    private fun visitNewLineIndentation(
 846→        node: ASTNode,
 847→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 848→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 849→    ) {
 850→        if (node.ignoreIndent()) {
 851→            return
 852→        }
 853→
 854→        val normalizedNodeIndent = node.normalizedIndent(emit)
 855→        val expectedIndentation = node.expectedIndent()
 856→        val text = node.text
 857→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
 858→        if (nodeIndent != normalizedNodeIndent || normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
 859→            if (normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
 860→                emit(
 861→                    node.startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
 862→                    "Unexpected indentation (${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) (should be ${expectedIndentation.length})",
 863→                    true,
 864→                )
 865→            } else {
 866→                // Indentation was at correct level but contained invalid indent characters. This violation has already
 867→                // been emitted.
 868→            }
 869→            LOGGER.trace {
 870→                "Line $line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "changed indentation to ${expectedIndentation.length} " +
 871→                    "(from ${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}"
 872→            }
 873→            if (autoCorrect) {
 874→                (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
 875→                    text.substringBeforeLast("\n") + "\n" + expectedIndentation,
 876→                )
 877→            }
 878→        } else {
 879→            node.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
 880→        }
 881→    }
 882→
 883→    private fun ASTNode.ignoreIndent(): Boolean {
 884→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
 885→        if (text.endsWith("\n") && nextLeaf.isStartOfRawStringLiteral()) {
 886→            processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
 887→            return true // raw strings (""") are allowed at column 0
 888→        }
 889→
 890→        nextLeaf
 891→            ?.parent({ it.psi is PsiComment }, strict = false)
 892→            ?.let { comment ->
 893→                if (text.endsWith("\n")) {
 894→                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
 895→                    return true // comments are allowed at column 0
 896→                }
 897→                if (comment.textContains('\n') && comment.elementType == BLOCK_COMMENT) {
 898→                    // FIXME: while we cannot assume any kind of layout inside a block comment,
 899→                    // `/*` and `*/` can still be indented
 900→                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
 901→                    return true
 902→                }
 903→            }
 904→        return false
 905→    }
 906→
 907→    private fun ASTNode?.isStartOfRawStringLiteral(): Boolean = this != null && this.elementType == OPEN_QUOTE && this.text == "\"\"\""
 908→
 909→    private fun ASTNode.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded() =
 910→        LOGGER.trace { "No indentation change required for $elementType: ${textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
 911→
 912→    private fun ASTNode.expectedIndent(): String {
 913→        val lastIndexContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
 914→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
 915→        val adjustedChildIndent =
 916→            when {
 917→                this == lastIndexContext.fromASTNode.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ||
 918→                    nextLeaf == lastIndexContext.fromASTNode.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ->
 919→                    lastIndexContext.firstChildIndent
 920→
 921→                this == lastIndexContext.toASTNode ||
 922→                    nextLeaf == lastIndexContext.toASTNode ->
 923→                    lastIndexContext.lastChildIndent
 924→
 925→                else -> lastIndexContext.childIndent
 926→            }
 927→        return lastIndexContext.nodeIndent + adjustedChildIndent
 928→    }
 929→
 930→    private fun ASTNode.normalizedIndent(emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit): String {
 931→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
 932→        return when (indentConfig.indentStyle) {
 933→            SPACE -> {
 934→                if ('\t' in nodeIndent) {
 935→                    emit(
 936→                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
 937→                        "Unexpected tab character(s)",
 938→                        true,
 939→                    )
 940→                    indentConfig.toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndent)
 941→                } else {
 942→                    nodeIndent
 943→                }
 944→            }
 945→
 946→            TAB -> {
 947→                val acceptableTrailingSpaces = acceptableTrailingSpaces()
 948→                val nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces = nodeIndent.removeSuffix(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
 949→                if (' ' in nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces) {
 950→                    emit(
 951→                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
 952→                        "Unexpected space character(s)",
 953→                        true,
 954→                    )
 955→                    indentConfig
 956→                        .toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces)
 957→                        .plus(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
 958→                } else {
 959→                    nodeIndent
 960→                }
 961→            }
 962→        }
 963→    }
 964→
 965→    private fun visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(
 966→        node: ASTNode,
 967→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 968→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 969→    ) {
 970→        if (!this::stringTemplateIndenter.isInitialized) {
 971→            stringTemplateIndenter = StringTemplateIndenter(indentConfig)
 972→        }
 973→        stringTemplateIndenter.visitClosingQuotes(currentIndent(), node.treeParent, autoCorrect, emit)
 974→    }
 975→
 976→    private fun ASTNode.acceptableTrailingSpaces(): String {
 977→        require(elementType == WHITE_SPACE)
 978→        val acceptableTrailingSpaces = when (nextLeaf()?.elementType) {
 979→            KDOC_LEADING_ASTERISK, KDOC_END -> {
 980→                // The indentation of a KDoc comment contains a space as the last character regardless of the indentation
 981→                // style (tabs or spaces) except for the starting line of the KDoc comment
 982→                KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT
 983→            }
 984→
 985→            TYPE_CONSTRAINT -> {
 986→                // 6 spaces (length of "where" keyword plus a separator space) to indent type constraints as below:
 987→                //    where A1 : RecyclerView.Adapter<V1>,
 988→                //               A1 : ComposableAdapter.ViewTypeProvider,
 989→                TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT
 990→            }
 991→
 992→            else -> ""
 993→        }
 994→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
 995→        return if (nodeIndent.endsWith(acceptableTrailingSpaces)) {
 996→            return acceptableTrailingSpaces
 997→        } else {
 998→            ""
 999→        }
1000→    }
1001→
1002→    private fun startNoIndentZone(node: ASTNode) =
1003→        IndentContext(
1004→            fromASTNode = node,
1005→            nodeIndent = "",
1006→            firstChildIndent = "",
1007→            childIndent = "",
1008→            lastChildIndent = "",
1009→            activated = true,
1010→        )
1011→
1012→    private companion object {
1013→        const val KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT = " "
1014→        const val TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT = "      " // Length of keyword "where" plus separating space
1015→    }
1016→
1017→    private data class IndentContext(
1018→        /**
1019→         * The node on which the indent context starts.
1020→         */
1021→        val fromASTNode: ASTNode,
1022→
1023→        /**
1024→         * The node at which the indent context ends. If null, then the context ends at the last child leaf of the node
1025→         * on which the indent context starts.
1026→         */
1027→        val toASTNode: ASTNode = fromASTNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
1028→
1029→        /**
1030→         * Cumulative indentation for the node. Normally this should be equal to a multiple of the
1031→         * 'indentConfig.indentStyle' to ensure a consistent indentation style.
1032→         */
1033→        val nodeIndent: String,
1034→
1035→        /**
1036→         * Additional indentation for first child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1037→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1038→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1039→         */
1040→        val firstChildIndent: String,
1041→
1042→        /**
1043→         * Additional indentation for child nodes. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to ensure
1044→         * a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it is
1045→         * still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1046→         */
1047→        val childIndent: String,
1048→
1049→        /**
1050→         * Additional indentation for last child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1051→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1052→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1053→         */
1054→        val lastChildIndent: String,
1055→
1056→        /**
1057→         * True when the indentation level of this context is activated
1058→         */
1059→        val activated: Boolean = false,
1060→    ) {
1061→        val nodes: String
1062→            get() =
1063→                fromASTNode
1064→                    .prevLeaf() // The 'fromAstNode' itself needs to be returned by '.leaves()' call as well
1065→                    ?.leaves()
1066→                    .orEmpty()
1067→                    .takeWhile {
1068→                        // The 'toAstNode' itself needs to be included as well
1069→                        it != toASTNode.nextLeaf()
1070→                    }
1071→                    .joinToString(separator = "") { it.text }
1072→                    .textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1073→
1074→        fun indent() =
1075→            if (activated) {
1076→                nodeIndent + childIndent
1077→            } else {
1078→                nodeIndent
1079→            }
1080→
1081→        fun prevCodeLeaf() = fromASTNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
1082→    }
1083→}
1084→
1085→private fun ASTNode.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline() = text.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1086→
1087→private fun String.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline(): String {
1088→    val (prefix, suffix) = if (this.all { it.isWhitespace() }) {
1089→        Pair("[", "]")
1090→    } else {
1091→        Pair("", "")
1092→    }
1093→    return prefix
1094→        .plus(
1095→            this
1096→                .replace("\t", "\\t")
1097→                .replace("\n", "\\n"),
1098→        ).plus(suffix)
1099→}
1100→
1101→private class StringTemplateIndenter(private val indentConfig: IndentConfig) {
1102→    fun visitClosingQuotes(
1103→        expectedIndent: String,
1104→        node: ASTNode,
1105→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1106→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1107→    ) {
1108→        require(node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE)
1109→        node
1110→            .let { it.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression }
1111→            .takeIf { it.isFollowedByTrimIndent() || it.isFollowedByTrimMargin() }
1112→            ?.takeIf { it.isMultiLine() }
1113→            ?.let { _ ->
1114→                if (node.containsMixedIndentationCharacters()) {
1115→                    // It can not be determined with certainty how mixed indentation characters should be interpreted.
1116→                    // The trimIndent function handles tabs and spaces equally (one tabs equals one space) while the user
1117→                    // might expect that the tab size in the indentation is more than one space.
1118→                    emit(
1119→                        node.startOffset,
1120→                        "Indentation of multiline string should not contain both tab(s) and space(s)",
1121→                        false,
1122→                    )
1123→                    return
1124→                }
1125→
1126→                val prefixLength = node.getCommonPrefixLength()
1127→                val correctedExpectedIndent =
1128→                    if (node.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n") {
1129→                        // In case the opening quotes are placed at the start of the line, then the closing quotes
1130→                        // should have no indent as well.
1131→                        ""
1132→                    } else {
1133→                        expectedIndent
1134→                    }
1135→                node.children()
1136→                    .forEach {
1137→                        if (it.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n" &&
1138→                            (
1139→                                it.isLiteralStringTemplateEntry() ||
1140→                                    it.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() ||
1141→                                    it.isClosingQuote()
1142→                                )
1143→                        ) {
1144→                            val (actualIndent, actualContent) =
1145→                                if (it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote()) {
1146→                                    it.text.splitIndentAt(it.text.length)
1147→                                } else if (it.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() && it.isFirstNonBlankElementOnLine()) {
1148→                                    it.getFirstElementOnSameLine().text.splitIndentAt(correctedExpectedIndent.length)
1149→                                } else {
1150→                                    it.text.splitIndentAt(prefixLength)
1151→                                }
1152→                            if (indentConfig.containsUnexpectedIndentChar(actualIndent)) {
1153→                                val offsetFirstWrongIndentChar =
1154→                                    indentConfig.indexOfFirstUnexpectedIndentChar(actualIndent)
1155→                                emit(
1156→                                    it.startOffset + offsetFirstWrongIndentChar,
1157→                                    "Unexpected '${indentConfig.unexpectedIndentCharDescription}' character(s) in margin of multiline " +
1158→                                        "string",
1159→                                    true,
1160→                                )
1161→                                if (autoCorrect) {
1162→                                    (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1163→                                        correctedExpectedIndent + actualContent,
1164→                                    )
1165→                                }
1166→                            } else if (actualIndent != correctedExpectedIndent && it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote()) {
1167→                                // It is a deliberate choice not to fix the indents inside the string literal except the line which only contains
1168→                                // the closing quotes.
1169→                                emit(
1170→                                    it.startOffset,
1171→                                    "Unexpected indent of multiline string closing quotes",
1172→                                    true,
1173→                                )
1174→                                if (autoCorrect) {
1175→                                    if (it.firstChildNode == null) {
1176→                                        (it as LeafPsiElement).rawInsertBeforeMe(
1177→                                            LeafPsiElement(REGULAR_STRING_PART, correctedExpectedIndent),
1178→                                        )
1179→                                    } else {
1180→                                        (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1181→                                            correctedExpectedIndent + actualContent,
1182→                                        )
1183→                                    }
1184→                                }
1185→                            }
1186→                        }
1187→                    }
1188→            }
1189→    }
1190→
1191→    /**
1192→     * Get the length of the indent which is shared by all lines inside the string template except for the indent of
1193→     * the closing quotes.
1194→     */
1195→    private fun ASTNode.getCommonPrefixLength() =
1196→        children()
1197→            .filterNot { it.elementType == OPEN_QUOTE }
1198→            .filterNot { it.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE }
1199→            .filter { it.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n" }
1200→            .filterNot { it.text == "\n" }
1201→            .let { indents ->
1202→                val indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote = indents
1203→                    .filterNot { it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote() }
1204→                if (indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote.count() > 0) {
1205→                    indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote
1206→                } else {
1207→                    indents
1208→                }
1209→            }
1210→            .map { it.text.indentLength() }
1211→            .minOrNull()
1212→            ?: 0
1213→
1214→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimIndent() = isFollowedBy("trimIndent()")
1215→
1216→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimMargin() = isFollowedBy("trimMargin()")
1217→
1218→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedBy(callExpressionName: String) =
1219→        this.node.nextSibling { it.elementType != DOT }
1220→            .let { it?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION && it.text == callExpressionName }
1221→
1222→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isMultiLine(): Boolean {
1223→        for (child in node.children()) {
1224→            if (child.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY) {
1225→                val v = child.text
1226→                if (v == "\n") {
1227→                    return true
1228→                }
1229→            }
1230→        }
1231→        return false
1232→    }
1233→
1234→    private fun ASTNode.containsMixedIndentationCharacters(): Boolean {
1235→        assert((this.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression).isMultiLine())
1236→        val nonBlankLines = this
1237→            .text
1238→            .split("\n")
1239→            .filterNot { it.startsWith("\"\"\"") }
1240→            .filterNot { it.endsWith("\"\"\"") }
1241→            .filterNot { it.isBlank() }
1242→        val prefixLength = nonBlankLines.minOfOrNull { it.indentLength() } ?: 0
1243→        val distinctIndentCharacters = nonBlankLines
1244→            .joinToString(separator = "") {
1245→                it.splitIndentAt(prefixLength).first
1246→            }
1247→            .toCharArray()
1248→            .distinct()
1249→            .count()
1250→        return distinctIndentCharacters > 1
1251→    }
1252→
1253→    private fun ASTNode.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote() =
1254→        elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE || (text.isBlank() && nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE)
1255→
1256→    private fun ASTNode.isLiteralStringTemplateEntry() = elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY && text != "\n"
1257→
1258→    private fun ASTNode.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() =
1259→        elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY || elementType == SHORT_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY
1260→
1261→    private fun ASTNode.isClosingQuote() = elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE
1262→
1263→    private fun String.indentLength() = indexOfFirst { !it.isWhitespace() }.let { if (it == -1) length else it }
1264→
1265→    /**
1266→     * Splits the string at the given index or at the first non-white space character before that index. The returned pair
1267→     * consists of the indentation and the second part contains the remainder. Note that the second part still can start
1268→     * with whitespace characters in case the original strings starts with more white space characters than the requested
1269→     * split index.
1270→     */
1271→    private fun String.splitIndentAt(index: Int): Pair<String, String> {
1272→        assert(index >= 0)
1273→        val firstNonWhitespaceIndex = indexOfFirst { !it.isWhitespace() }.let {
1274→            if (it == -1) {
1275→                this.length
1276→            } else {
1277→                it
1278→            }
1279→        }
1280→        val safeIndex = kotlin.math.min(firstNonWhitespaceIndex, index)
1281→        return Pair(
1282→            first = this.take(safeIndex),

1288→        val firstLeafOnLine = prevLeaf { it.text == "\n" }
